results.title: Maa Behen: Madhuri Dixit And Triptii Dimri React After Dharna Durga Viral Video Sparks ‘Snub’ Debate During Promotions; Says, ‘Everyone Is...’
results.description: A seemingly small moment from the promotions of Maa Behen unexpectedly snowballed into a social media debate after influencer-actor Dharna Durga appeared to be sidelined during a photo-op alongside Triptii Dimri and Madhuri Dixit. The post Maa Behen: Madhuri Dixit And Triptii Dimri React After Dharna Durga Viral Video Sparks ‘Snub’ Debate During Promotions; Says, ‘Everyone Is...’ appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .
